case_title: ASHA WIEGAND-SHAHANI ET AL VS. ANNA MCDONALD-HAMILTON ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL. THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS APPROVED
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-14-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-13-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ASHA WIEGAND-SHAHANI, KAIA RENOUF & EVAN MCCARTY ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINEY HAMILTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANNA MCDONALD-HAMILTON IS NOT PRESENT. PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, MATTER TO BE CONTINUED TO AUGUST 13, 2018. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: NEWTON LAM; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/7/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-16-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-14-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ASHA WIEGAND-SHAHANI, KAIA RENOUF & EVAN MCCARTY ARE PRESENT. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFFS INDICATED PAYMENTS WERE NOT BEING HONORED PROPERLY FROM ONE DEFENDANT PER SRL SIGNED AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFFS AGREED TO CONTINUE ATTEMPTS TO COMMUNICATE WITH DEFENDANTS ABOUT RECEIVING PAYMENTS PROPERLY AND FOR THE MATTER TO BE CONTINUED TO AN EARLIER DATE OF MAY 14 AS OPPOSED TO WAITING UNTIL AUGUST 13 PRE-SCHEDULED PROGRESS REPORT HEARING. AUGUST 13 HEARING WILL STILL TAKE PLACE AS SCHEDULED. IF NO APPEARANCES BY PARTIES AT THE MAY 14TH HEARING THE MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED TO AUGUST 13TH. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANE PEEBLES; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO ANNA MCDONALD-HAMILTON ON 02/05/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS ASHA WIEGAND-SHAHANI, RENOUF KAIA AND EVAN MCCARTY. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS ANNA MCDONALD-HAMILTON AND LINLEY HAMILTON. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE OCT 25 HEARING CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/07/2021 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.

PURSUANT TO THE SIGNED MEDIATION AGREEMENT IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE FEBRUARY 5, 2018 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE WILL BE CONTINUED TO AUGUST 13, 2018 FOR A FINAL PROGRESS REPORT. PLAINTIFF'S ASHA WIEGAND-SHAHANI AND EVAN MCCARTY ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ANNA MCDONALD-HAMILTON AND LINEY HAMITON ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-25-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ASHA WIEGAND-SHAHANI, KAIA RENOUF & EVAN MCCARTY ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINEY HAMILTON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANNA MCDONALD-HAMILTON IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S INDICATED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT HAS NOT BEEN COMPLETELY EXECUTED AND REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE, MATTER TO BE CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 25, 2018. IF NO APPEARANCES CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
